hardRules.purpose: Absolute implementation constraints that override all sub-agent default behaviors.
hardRules.downstreamRule: FORBIDDEN: Tailwind CSS classes, Lucide/Heroicons/FontAwesome icons, CDN links to any CSS framework, self-invented SVG paths. MANDATORY: Copy HTML structure verbatim from preview/component-{slug}.html. Use library's custom CSS classes (.top-nav, .sidenav, .menu-item, .data-table, etc). Link colors_and_type.css + components.css for styling. Sidenav icons are already inline in the preview HTML — copy them directly.

tokens.purpose: Design language source: color scales, semantic aliases, typography, radius, spacing, shadow, and dark-mode overrides.
tokens.downstreamRule: Use semantic aliases (--color-primary, --color-surface, --color-border, --radius-sm, --space-*) first. Reference color scales (--primary-6, --danger-6) only for status and brand contexts.

components.purpose: Component-level markup, classes, token consumption, DOM anatomy, and provenance. Preview HTML is a CODE TEMPLATE, not a visual reference.
components.downstreamRule: COPY markup verbatim from preview/component-{slug}.html (HTML structure, CSS class names, inline SVG icons). Only modify text content and data values. Never rewrite structure using Tailwind utilities or substitute icons with Lucide/Heroicons. Link colors_and_type.css + components.css and keep page-local layout out of shared component CSS.

icons.purpose: SVG icon assets. assets/icons/ for general icons, assets/icons/sidenav-icon/ for sidebar navigation icons.
icons.downstreamRule: Inline SVG content into the page for self-contained output. Sidenav icons must be read from assets/icons/sidenav-icon/. Do not use placeholder or invented SVG paths.

snippets.purpose: TopNav logo HTML fragments referencing assets/ PNG images. Must be Read and pasted verbatim.
snippets.downstreamRule: Read snippets/nav-logo.html and paste content verbatim into TopNav. Never replace with text, SVG, or placeholders.

uikit.purpose: Page-level visual showcase and component-composition evidence for B2B admin pages.
uikit.downstreamRule: Read UIKit pages for structure and layout patterns. Use component previews for reusable markup. Do not copy outer shell as production template.

modeA_inlineSvg.syntax: Read SVG file content and inline as <svg>...</svg>
modeA_inlineSvg.useFor: All icon usage in generated pages to ensure self-contained output.

iconUsage.colorRule: Do not edit shipped SVG geometry. Sidenav icons use currentColor for theming.

useTokensOnly.consume: Link the CSS or read css.json for machine consumption.

buildSingleComponent.consume: COPY component markup verbatim from preview HTML. Keep canonical class names, DOM structure, and inline SVGs unchanged. Never rewrite with Tailwind or substitute icons.

buildFullPage.consume: Use UIKit as layout reference. Assemble page by COPYING component HTML verbatim from preview/component-{slug}.html — preserve all CSS class names, DOM structure, and inline SVG. Only change text/data content. Link colors_and_type.css + components.css. NEVER use Tailwind or Lucide icons. Sidenav icons are already inline in preview — no need to read snippets/sidenav-icons.json.

recommendedReadOrder: SKILL.md (PRIORITY: read hard rules section first)
